description: ADK layer registry. Abstract layer names and their GDS (layer/datatype) coordinates. Consumed by the KLayout deck, the KiCad DRU generator, and any tool that needs to know which layer number an ADK abstract name maps to (e.g. hyp_to_gds.py).

exchange0.purpose: Mechanical outline of the chiplet die (face-down attachment area). One polygon per chiplet placed on the interposer.

exchange1.purpose: Reserved exchange-layer slot for future chiplet metadata.
